narrative:
Worth 1-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 490 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.1%, a modest Republican lean of 3.5 percentage points.
